clue: History major, a public servant famous for his writing!?
explanation: History major is H. A is simply A! And "public servant famous for his writing" can accurately describe (John) MILTON. Altogether, we have (Alexander) HAMILTON, who is a major figure in history (a "history major"), and was also a public servant famous for his writing.
hints: This one's a bit cheeky. The whole thing is the wordplay, and the whole thing is the definition.
A clue like this doesn't need an "a" to make sense, so it must be part of the wordplay: A.
To finish off the wordplay, we need a public servant famous for his writing. Although...
...It might be easier to work back from the answer instead. Who's a major figure from history and public servant famous for his writing, beginning HA...?
